parameters.query: INSERT INTO ingest_runs (id, pipeline_name, trigger_type, status, items_found, items_created, items_updated, items_failed, started_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, 'collector-v2', 'manual', 'RUNNING', 0, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING id AS run_id, pipeline_name, trigger_type, status, started_at;

SELECT '{{ $json.run_id }}'::text AS run_id, id AS source_id, name AS source_name, platform, source_kind, url, trust_score, discovery_method, notes FROM sources WHERE is_active = true AND url IS NOT NULL AND lower(COALESCE(platform, 'website')) IN ('website', 'web') ORDER BY trust_score DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 25;

SELECT '{{ $json.run_id }}'::text AS run_id, '{{ ($json.content_hash || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS content_hash, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM raw_ingest_items WHERE external_id = '{{ ($json.content_hash || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}') AS content_exists;

INSERT INTO raw_ingest_items (id, source_id, entity_guess, platform, source_url, external_id, raw_title, raw_text, raw_datetime_text, raw_location_text, raw_image_url, raw_payload_json, language_hint, city_guess, country_code, status, error_message, processed_at, ingested_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ $json.source_id ? "'" + $json.source_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ ($json.entity_guess || 'UNKNOWN').replace(/'/g, ) }}', 'website', {{ $json.candidate_url_normalized ? "'" + $json.candidate_url_normalized.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ ($json.content_hash || '').replace(/'/g, ) }}', {{ $json.raw_title ? "'" + $json.raw_title.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.raw_text ? "'" + $json.raw_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.raw_datetime_text ? "'" + $json.raw_datetime_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.raw_location_text ? "'" + $json.raw_location_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.raw_image_url ? "'" + $json.raw_image_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ ($json.raw_payload_json || '{}').replace(/'/g, ) }}', {{ $json.language_hint ? "'" + $json.language_hint.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.city_guess ? "'" + $json.city_guess.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, 'DE', '{{ ($json.status || 'ERROR').replace(/'/g, ) }}', {{ $json.error_message ? "'" + $json.error_message.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING id, source_id, source_url, external_id, status, error_message, ingested_at;

UPDATE ingest_runs SET status = 'FINISHED', items_found = {{ $items('Expand Event Candidates').length }}, items_created = {{ $items('Persist Raw Item').filter(item => ['PENDING','REVIEW'].includes(item.json.status)).length }}, items_updated = 0, items_failed = {{ $items('Persist Raw Item').filter(item => item.json.status === 'ERROR').length }}, finished_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), log_text = '{{ JSON.stringify({ sources_total: $items('Load Collector Sources').length, sources_fetched_ok: $items('Normalize Source Fetch Result').filter(item => item.json.fetch_status === "SUCCESS").length, sources_failed: $items('Normalize Source Fetch Result').filter(item => item.json.fetch_status !== "SUCCESS").length, candidates_total: $items('Expand Event Candidates').length, candidates_fetched_ok: $items('Normalize Candidate Fetch Result').filter(item => item.json.fetch_status === "SUCCESS").length, candidates_failed: $items('Normalize Candidate Fetch Result').filter(item => item.json.fetch_status !== "SUCCESS").length, raw_items_written: $items('Persist Raw Item').length, raw_items_error: $items('Persist Raw Item').filter(item => item.json.status === "ERROR").length, raw_items_pending_review: $items('Persist Raw Item').filter(item => item.json.status === "PENDING").length }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}' WHERE id = '{{ $json.run_id }}' RETURNING id, status, items_found, items_created, items_failed, finished_at;
